stem: A agricultural research study surveys 500 seeds planted and observes 182 positive outcomes out of 500 (36.4%). Estimate the true germination rate and provide a 95% confidence interval.

ground_truth.answer: Sample proportion: 0.364. Wilson 95% CI: [0.323, 0.4071]. Point estimate: 0.365.

common_failure_modes: Using the Wald interval (p̂ ± z√(p̂(1-p̂)/n)) which performs poorly for small samples
Not reporting the confidence interval alongside the point estimate
